title: esenbeckia alata var. laevis
intro: Esenbeckia alata var. laevis, also known as the rough or winged esenbeckia, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its rich content of limonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Esenbeckia alata var. laevis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin infections and wounds. Esenbeckia alata var. laevis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
